agent_info.transcription: Well, making your own beer can be a bit tricky. First, you need to get some basic ingredients like malted barley, hops, yeast and water. You start by steeping the malted barley in hot water to extract the sugars. Then, you boil the wort, which is the liquid after the barley has been steeped. Add the hops at different stages of the boil to get the right bitterness and flavor. After that, you cool the wort down and add the yeast. The yeast will then ferment the sugars in the wort into alcohol.
